title: astragalus atratus var. atratus
intro: Astragalus atratus var. atratus, also known as the black milkvetch, is a perennial plant species within the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and saponins, and is used to promote respiratory health, boost the immune system, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Astragalus atratus var. atratus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular function, and enhance the body's natural response to stress. Herbal preparations of the plant are commonly available in the form of capsules, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
